app.title: Parametric Disaster Payout Demo
app.tagline: Insurance demo flow through the Vercel BFF

banner.notice: This service is a demo for demand research and does not underwrite policies or make real payments.

home.title: Keep Rails hidden while the demo payout flow runs in the browser.
home.description: The browser always talks to the Vercel domain, and Next.js Route Handlers relay API traffic to Rails.
home.featureA: Persistent strip with the demo notice
home.featureC: Session cookie issued on the Next.js side

login.title: Send a Google ID token to the BFF to start a session.
login.description: The browser posts only to the Vercel domain, and Next.js forwards the request safely to Rails.
login.idTokenPlaceholder: Paste the ID token from Google
login.hint: A successful sign-in sets a session cookie scoped to the Vercel domain.
